test_cases.scenario: Fill name, email, phone, password → Submit
test_cases.steps: Register — Fill name, email, phone, password → Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Account created. OTP sent to email. Redirect to activate.

test_cases.scenario: Submit empty form / weak password / invalid email
test_cases.steps: Register validation — Submit empty form / weak password / invalid email
test_cases.expected_result: Inline errors shown. Form doesn't submit.

test_cases.steps: OTP verification — Enter correct OTP from email
test_cases.expected_result: Account activated. Redirect to dashboard.
test_cases.preconditions: User must have registered and received OTP email

test_cases.steps: Login — valid credentials — Enter email + password → Login
test_cases.expected_result: Login succeeds. Dashboard loads. No blank screen.
test_cases.preconditions: User must have a registered account

test_cases.steps: Login — wrong password — Enter wrong password
test_cases.expected_result: Error: "Invalid login credentials". Can retry.

test_cases.steps: Login — non-existent email — Enter unregistered email
test_cases.expected_result: Error shown. Not a security leak (generic message).

test_cases.steps: Forgot password — Click "Forgot?" → Enter email → Submit
test_cases.expected_result: Reset email sent. Confirmation shown with timer.
test_cases.preconditions: User must have a registered account

test_cases.scenario: Click reset link → Enter new password
test_cases.steps: Reset password — Click reset link → Enter new password
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed. Can login with new password. Old rejected.
test_cases.preconditions: User must have requested password reset

test_cases.steps: Session persistence — Login → Close browser → Reopen
test_cases.expected_result: Still logged in. Dashboard loads directly.

test_cases.expected_result: Logged out. Redirected to landing page. Protected routes redirect to login.
